summary: Iteration 3 testing completed for new features: Navbar 'About Us' label, hover glow effects, About page title change, team member hover animations, and Admin batch upload. All features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working. Navbar shows 'ABOUT US' in both desktop and mobile. Hover glow effect uses drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)]. About page title is 'About Us'. Team cards have group-hover animations with scale-110 image zoom. Admin batch upload section visible with category selector and multi-file input.

navbar.navigation_about: PASS - About Us link navigates correctly

about_page.title: PASS - Title says 'About Us' (not 'About Chitrakatha')
about_page.team_row1_count: PASS - Row 1 has 4 members (Upasak, Deep Shekhar, Debraj, Sandip)
about_page.team_row2_count: PASS - Row 2 has 2 members (Rudra Pratap Sen, Abhirup Roy)
about_page.team_row2_centered: PASS - Row 2 uses flex justify-center for centering
about_page.team_card_group_class: PASS - Cards have 'group' class for group-hover
about_page.team_card_hover_border: PASS - Cards have hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 for golden border glow
about_page.team_image_zoom: PASS - Images have group-hover:scale-110 for zoom effect
about_page.team_name_gold_hover: PASS - Names have group-hover:text-[#D4AF37] for gold color on hover

admin_dashboard.login: PASS - Admin login with admin@chitrakatha.com / admin123 works
admin_dashboard.gallery_tab: PASS - Gallery Management tab visible and clickable
admin_dashboard.batch_upload_section: PASS - 'Batch Upload Multiple Images' section visible
admin_dashboard.single_upload_form: PASS - Single image upload form still works
admin_dashboard.gallery_items_display: PASS - 13 gallery items displayed with drag-and-drop indicators

services_page.book_now_modal: PASS - Book Now modal opens showing 'Contact Chitrakatha' with package info, phone, WhatsApp, email

backend_api.api_health: PASS - API root returns active status
backend_api.admin_login: PASS - Admin login returns token and user with is_admin=true
backend_api.admin_get_gallery: PASS - Admin can fetch gallery items
backend_api.admin_create_gallery: PASS - Admin can create gallery items
backend_api.admin_delete_gallery: PASS - Admin can delete gallery items
backend_api.admin_reorder_gallery: PASS - Admin can reorder gallery items
